diagnostic.help: declare and name the routed arc before routing it
diagnostic.message: view 'window' route references unknown arc handle @ghost

source.text:
net bad_window

(request_in) -speak_req-> [start] -speak_token-> (in_flight)

view window route @ghost orthogonal [{"x": 20, "y": 20}]
